title: Product Development Engineer
description:
THE ROLE: 

As a Product Development engineer, you will collaborate with various Product Development Groups to bring-up and ramp new products which include Plan, debug and handling manufacturing and characterization test programs for next-generation AMD microprocessors. 

THE PERSON: 

A successful candidate is one who can perform in a role that requires accountability for accuracy, reliability and completeness of assignment results critical to the project’s success.  

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: 

  • Validate new product features, test conditions, test methodologies, and test contents during first silicon bring-up 
  • Post Silicon Bring up of Test patterns leading to optimization for mass production enablement 
  • Analysis of part failures leading to test improvement 
  • Test pattern & test flow development, debug, test and characterization 

PREFERRED EXPERIENCE: 

  • Knowledge of scripting languages such as Perl, Ruby, shell script 
  • Good understanding of Linux, Unix or Windows OS 
  • ATE (Automatic Test Equipment) test experience 

ACADEMIC CREDENTIALS: 

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s in electrical engineering, computer engineering, or comparable disciplines

postedCompany.description:
AMD (NYSE: AMD) is a semiconductor design innovator leading the next era of vivid digital experiences with its groundbreaking AMD Accelerated Processing Units (APUs) that power a wide range of computing devices. AMD’s server computing products are focused on driving industry-leading cloud computing and virtualization environments. AMD’s superior graphics technologies are found in a variety of solutions ranging from game consoles, PCs to supercomputers.

 

AMD, Singapore is the Singapore Product Development Center (SPDC) for AMD as well as its Asia Pacific regional headquarters for AMD Sales and Marketing.


Established in 1984, AMD Singapore is an engineering site leveraging the differentiated engineering expertise and unique eco-system for product bring-up and sample generation enabling timely product launches, higher test cost margins and the quality expectations of our customers.


AMD SPDC actively taps into the large talent pool from the region. Today its highly sophisticated and efficient engineering operations environments are equipped with high-end engineering laboratories that support New Product Bring-up, Customer Samples Generation, Device Analysis, Reliability Testing, Surface Mount Board Assembly Evaluations, Packaging Characterization, Platform Validation and Hardware Debug.


AMD SPDC strives to recruit and retain the best talent, making it not only a great place to work but also an integral part of the AMD family by continuing to contribute significantly to AMD’s success.
postedCompany.name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD
